message:
fix: use full actionable set for recipe filters instead of top_picks subset

The recipe filter was using only the top_picks from triage (a capped
subset) to determine actionable IDs, which could silently drop valid
actionable items.  Extract actionable_ids_for_recipe_filters() that
queries the full graph and add a regression test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -487,7 +487,7 @@ pub struct Cli {
     #[arg(long, action = ArgAction::SetTrue)]
     pub check_drift: bool,
 
-    /// Accepted for compatibility; related work already includes closed issues by default.
+    /// Include closed issues in related work discovery.
     #[arg(long, action = ArgAction::SetTrue)]
     pub related_include_closed: bool,
